pivHint: HEART isn't just where a person's plans take shape. When something is pleasing to your HEART, we often say that it _____ you.
winText: You found it. HEART isn't just where plans form - it's also what a well-fitted jacket and pants are called, and we say it "SUITS" you.
lossText: The word was SUITS. HEART was the pivot - the HEART of a person's plans, and a matching jacket and pants that "SUITS" you.
votdVerse: Many are the plans in a person's heart, but it is the LORD's purpose that prevails.
passageText: Listen to advice and accept discipline, and at the end you will be counted among the wise. Many are the plans in a person's heart, but it is the LORD's purpose that prevails. What a person desires is unfailing love; better to be poor than a liar. The fear of the LORD leads to life; then one rests content, untouched by trouble.
